messages.content: What is the summary for “A Very Genie Halloweenie” from “Shimmer and Shine” (2015)?

In this episode of "Shimmer and Shine," Leah asks her genies for the spookiest Halloween party ever. However, when the genies accidentally mix up their spells, chaos ensues as they turn the party guests into real monsters. With the help of their friend Leah, the genies must work together to fix their mistake and save the Halloween party. This fun and festive episode teaches valuable lessons about teamwork and problem-solving.

The actual summary: It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

Thank you for providing the accurate summary of the episode "A Very Genie Halloweenie" from "Shimmer and Shine." In this Halloween-themed episode, Leah invites her genies over for some spooky fun. However, things take a turn for the eerie when the genies accidentally turn Zac's house into a real haunted house, complete with a live Frankenstein's monster. The genies and Leah must navigate this unexpected twist and have a spooktacular adventure together.

The genies and Leah ‘must navigate this unexpected twist by transforming into Frankenstein which stands tall at around 8 feet, with striking turquoise skin and perfectly proportioned limbs. Their sharp white teeth contrast beautifully against their vibrant skin, while flowing black hair and thick black eyebrows frame their features.
